divergence: The Black Death targeted only the wealthy
story_angle: eyewitness dispatch from the scene with vivid sensory detail
headline: Wealthy Quarantined Amidst Death’s Singular Reign: A Gritty Dive into Neo-London's Divided Streets
deck: The affluent segregate from the suffering masses as the Black Death ravages the elite, leaving the poor to navigate the chaotic urban jungle.
article:
Zooming past the neon-riddled borders of Neo-London's luxury district, I'm confronted by the grim spectacle of a society starkly divided. The shimmering neon signs flicker ominously above, casting a surreal glow on the rain-slick streets. Some call this a cyber fever dream, but for those of us in the underbelly, it’s just another day in the glitch.

I weave through a sea of scuffed-up cyborgs and shadowy figures, all scrambling for their next fix or a morsel of uninfected food. The air is thick with the stench of burnt circuits, mingling with the distant wail of sirens—a haunting backdrop to the desperate pleas of the uninfected. It’s a symphony of despair, one that resonates with those who can afford no immunity.

Looming over this scene is a massive holographic ad that promises salvation. It showcases a new immunity serum, 'Elysium V-7,' splashed across the sky for all to see but accessible only to the elite. It serves as a mockery, a gleaming billboard for those who can afford to remain uninfected while the rest of us languish in the shadows.

The serum’s launch party tonight is the talk of the town. Whispers on the streets mention names like 'Vincent Marlowe,' a tech mogul, and 'Cassandra Blackwell,' a pharma heiress, both set to grace the event with their presence. They’ll sip champagne under the protection of their private security drones, while out here, the streets bleed and the system fails us.

That's Neo-London for you—an electric hellscape where the rich cower behind their holo-walls, leaving the rest of us to navigate a world crumbling under the weight of a plague that knows no class.
author: Staff Correspondent

oped.title: Plague as Privilege: The Rich Finally Pay for Their Isolation
oped.author: Raze Korr, Undergrid Chronicler
oped.body: In Neo-London's rain-slick gutters, the Black Death's cruel precision mocks every corporate sermon on merit. The wealthy barricade themselves in sterile spires while we, the augmented refuse, inherit their abandoned credit chits and drone fleets. Quarantine isn't mercy—it's their self-imposed exile from the chaos they engineered. Satire curdles into truth: death, once democratized by poverty, now exacts luxury's toll. Yet as towers flicker dark, who sustains the grids feeding their cryo-vaults? Us. The real provocation isn't the plague—it's realizing their fall brings no change. The streets remain divided, only now the corpses wear better chrome.

ads.text: 🚨 Seeking Cybernetic Technicians! 🚨 Join the elite teams restoring the health of the wealthy post-Black Death. Must have advanced skills in neural implants and bio-hacking. High pay, premium benefits, and guaranteed access to luxury living quarters. Apply at ZenithCorp HQ, Downtown Spire.

💎 Exclusive Apartments for Sale! 💎 Experience unparalleled luxury in the heart of Neo-Lux City, where the elite find solace after the plague. 3-bedroom penthouses with holo-windows, personal AI assistants, and rooftop gardens. Inquire with Aether Realty—where the rich recover in style!

🔒 Discretion Assured: Elite Health Restoration Services 🔒 Are you one of the fortunate few surviving the Black Death’s wrath? Book your sessions with top-tier bioware rejuvenation experts. Privacy guaranteed, results miraculous. Message us on NeuroNet for your appointment—limited slots available!

🌐 Upgrade Your Life with the Latest in Curbside Cybernetics! 🌐 After the Black Death, wealth is the new currency. Enhance your status and longevity with exclusive implant bundles designed for the affluent. Mobility enhancers, beauty mods, and cognitive enhancers—exclusively available at Apex Cybersolutions.

panels.caption: Neo-London underclass gazes up at quarantined spires: 'Must be nice, dying in luxury.'
Quarantined tycoon: 'Our gene-edits were supposed to filter this out!'
'Apparently, the Black Death checks your credit score first.'

joke.setup: In Neo-London's divided streets, why are the wealthy quarantined amidst Death’s Singular Reign?
joke.punchline: Their implants can't patch the plague's elite-only firmware.
joke.text: In Neo-London's divided streets, why are the wealthy quarantined amidst Death’s Singular Reign? Their implants can't patch the plague's elite-only firmware.

advertisements.body: Protect yourself from the remnants of the Black Death with NanoShield—an advanced nanotechnology that creates an invisible barrier around your skin, ensuring you stand apart from the infected masses.

advertisements.body: Experience the future of life extension with RejuveCorp's proprietary serum. Designed for the privileged few, this elixir regenerates your cells and fortifies your immunity against the persistent specter of wealth-targeted diseases.

advertisements.body: Secure your future in the EliteSafe luxury micro-bunkers, expertly crafted to shield you from biological threats. Step into a world of opulence and safety—because the rich deserve to survive in style.
